intro_title:
DISCOVER
THE AGE OF
YOUR STOMACH
intro_subtitle:
Chance to win a super cool Apple Watch
from Manulife!
login_title: Share your real age with Manulife so we can see how it compares to your stomach’s age!
login_warning: Year of birth must be after 1900 and before 2025!
result_disclaimer: The quiz content is consulted by a gastroenterology specialist to encourage a healthy lifestyle. All information provided is for reference only. The game and survey results should not be used to make any medical treatment decisions.
result_cta:
Thank you for participating in the quiz!
For every quiz submission, Manulife will make a contribution on your behalf to support the Vietnam Young Physicians Association in purchasing medical equipment for gut health care.

Together, we are helping build a healthier Vietnam💚

quiz.complete_final_stage: Congrats on completing the final stage!

0.content:
A single meal can take 5 to 7 hours (or even longer) to fully digest!
🍖 Heavy, fatty foods tend to linger in your stomach much longer.
🥦 Meanwhile, veggies and fiber move through much more smoothly and quickly!

0.question: When a deadline is breathing down your neck, you usually…

answers.0: Stock up on healthy snacks — fuel first, finish strong
answers.1: Befriend coffee (and maybe a cigarette) to stay awake
answers.2: Deadline comes first - skip meals, skip sleep

1.question: Are you on Team “Breakfast Is Life”?

answers.0: Yes, every single day - I never skip breakfast
answers.1: About 3-4 days a week - it depends on the mood
answers.2: Less than 3 days a week… or basically never

1.content:
🍬 Sugary treats digest in a flash, so you’ll feel hungry again soon!
🥑 Foods rich in protein and fat digest slowly, keeping you full longer and helping curb snacking!

0.question: Does work often leave you “stressed to the max”?

answers.0: Rarely — I live chill and stay healthy
answers.1: Sometimes - I have light stress only
answers.2: Frequently and for long stretches - stress is my best friend

1.question: After lunch, how do you give your stomach “a little treat”?

answers.0: Take a light walk or relax a bit
answers.2: Lie down completely - no moving at all

2.content: 🛡️ Your stomach is your body’s first “bodyguard”! Thanks to stomach acid, bacteria and toxins from food get taken care of right at the gate!

0.question: Do you smoke or drink alcohol/beer?

answers.0: Never - my stomach prefers to stay healthy
answers.2: Regularly (3 times a week or more)

answers.0: “My soulmate” - I work out 3-5 days a week
answers.1: “Casual fling” - I exercise when free or motivated

0.title: YOUNG GUT
0.subtitle: Good group
0.description:
Fresh as a daisy — your digestive system is in its youth.

With a balanced lifestyle, regular sleep, and a light, healthy gut, your immunity is in great shape.

Keep it up by eating more vegetables, getting quality sleep, and smiling often!

1.title: MID-LIFE GUT
1.subtitle: Average group
1.description:
Your stomach has a solid foundation but may be a little "sensitive" due to some not-yet-optimal habits.

This is a great time to retrain your digestion: eat regularly, stress less, and your gut will thank you!

2.title: MATURE GUT
2.subtitle: Needs attention
2.description:
Your stomach has been through a lot — it just needs a little care!

It's time to "love your gut again" with healthier habits: eat regularly, enjoy smaller meals, chew your food well, cut back on alcohol, and smile more!
